turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey, uh,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopaedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good AI.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Alex?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Uh, no, this is Richard. I'm calling about my knee.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for letting me know, Richard.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Are you calling on behalf of Alex or is this about your own care?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No, this is for me, for my own knee.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please provide your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it's August 4th, 2000.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I need your full name, including your last name, along with your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Could you please provide your last name?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, it's Feynman. First name Richard, last name Feynman.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks, Richard.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: How can I help with your need today?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Are you looking to schedule an appointment, ask about a previous visit, or something else?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, I need to schedule an appointment for my right knee.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is this a new issue with your knee or are you following up on a previous visit or injury?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: This is a new issue, started a few weeks ago after a run.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you describe your knee issue as urgent or causing significant pain, or is it more of a routine concern you'd like checked out?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: It's aching on the inside and it clicks when I bend it, so I really want to get it checked out soon.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a specific provider you'd like to see or are you open to the first available appointment?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I'm open to the first available, whatever gets me in soon.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: There are no open appointments available this week.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to look for openings later next week, or do you have a specific date in mind?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Let’s check what you’ve got early next week, if possible.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: There are still no open appointments early next week.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to keep searching further out?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Or would you prefer to speak with someone from the clinic for help finding a sooner spot?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Let's go ahead and check later in the week, see what's open.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thank you.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, so can you check for any openings maybe Wednesday or Thursday next week?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: There are...

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Got it. Could you tell me the next available day and time you've got open later next week?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Let me check for available appointments later next week.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, thanks, I'll hold.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: It looks like you're requesting...

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sorry, could you tell me what days you're seeing open?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I don't see the open appointments available right now, even later next week. The clinic team has your request and will contact you as soon as the slot opens up.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else you'd like help with?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: So just to confirm, they'll reach out to me once they find a slot?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Yes, the clinic team will contact you at your number.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: as soon as an appointment becomes available.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hang on, that’s not my number. My number on file should be 662-669-4331, right?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I have your number as 329-213-0977.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like the clinic to use 662?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Instead, for the callback.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, let’s use 662-669-4331 for the callback.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: There are no available appointments showing right now.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I've let our clinic support team know about your request, and they'll get back to you as soon as possible to help schedule your knee appointment.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No, that covers it. Thanks, I’ll wait for their call.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, thanks, take care.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You're all set

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Bye now.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Goodbye. Richard, take care.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: You too, bye.
